spec.name: Under The Mudhole
spec.description: You stand in a small room with a great big opening in the ceiling. From this opening there is mud dripping down in large lumps. >YUCK<. You can smell the foul stench of the slimy sediment as you try not to get covered by the falling sludge. To the east there is an entryway leading out from here and it seems absolutely impossible to force the muddy descent.

east.description: East. You see nothing of interest.

extra_descs.description: You never saw such disgusting matter before, it nearly makes you puke.
